series_metadata.series_description: Documents client hearings by the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) to resolve disputes, make decisions, or review actions concerning such matters like professional licenses, unemployment, and other regulatory issues. Records include, but are not limited to, notice of opportunity for hearing, letter of intent, request for hearing, hearing notifications, scheduling information, case summons, court record, continuances, file sent by client (gathered during investigation), legal research, evidentiary materials, pleadings, exhibits, correspondence, attorney work product, report and recommendation from hearing officer, settlement and negotiation documents, and final adjudication order.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year after hearing closed. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately. ; Electronic: Retain 1 year after hearing closed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
